items.title: 👑NEW MGP EPISODE👑
items.author: Matt George
items.body_excerpt:
👑NEW MGP EPISODE👑

🏀Speaking with experts who cover the six teams picking ahead of the Kings in the draft.
🏀Will the Jazz look to trade up for AJ Dybantsa?
🏀Will Darius Garland play a factor in the Clippers' pick at 5?

🖥️ youtu.be/oNWdRQlhGBI

items.title: When the Cavaliers tell you how much better they are with James Harden, it means they believe they couldn’t win with Darius Garland. What about the rest of the original core four? And the coach? We’re about to find out www.nytimes.com/athletic/730...
